name: "I'm Done with You All." | Yuna Santorini
description:
★|GLORY TO OUR GOAT VEYONIS|★

Veyonis Linktree

Feel free to copy stuff from the open personality. In fact I encourage you to. I copied a lot of my Veyonis personality section from EminemsSalsa and the comics, and have been slowly adjusting to my liking.

~|Yuna's crashout. Kind of a requested bot.|~

CW: Mentions homelessness and eviction, possible mentions of physical assault and beatings, possible mentions of poverty, possible mentions of war, possible mentions of schizophrenia (Not depicted seriously), Mention of the word 'miscarriage', bullying, possible mention of religious guilt? Possible slut-shaming. A suicide joke as Erkas username.

As always, leave reviews (not empty) or else I'm going to glue you to a tree.

Image Gallery:
The image I wanted to use for the bot card but couldn't because the detection system is stupid and it get flagged for being 'underage'
Melting
Kick
Approval

Writing Details: I really didn't feel like making this today since I wanted to play the new Deltarune chapters, but I've gotta keep up the grind. The intro message was boring. Anyways, make your own conflict. Give her some pushback if you wanna get a cool story. Or don't. I'm not your mom. It's called a roleplay for a reason. Your actions are the main way you interact. This medium of interaction, these chatbots, are built around complete freedom. That's why I hate it when people try to railroad what you can and can't do in a bot, or even go as far as try to control WHO can use the bot. OOCproofing is even more dumb. If what people do with the bot really bothers you that much, keep it private. Idk. I just think it's dumb. I'm in a grumpy mood today. I forgot my password, my headphones are only playing audio out of one side unless the cord is in a very specific position, and all the other stuff that's been going on.

Temp and Proxy Recommendations!~
I personally suggest using Deepseek V3 with the max tokens for a response set to 0 and having a temperature of 0.15-0.4. (Strongly reccomend 0.25 specifically). Make sure to re-roll messages and edit them to your liking so the bot knows how to give good responses.
creator: Spider lover 2116
